name: Shaughn's Pineapple Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shortening and sugar together; cream well. Add egg and vanilla.
2. In a separate bowl, mix all dry ingredients together (flour, baking soda, salt). Gradually add to the shortening/sugar mixture with the pineapple. If needed, adjust by adding more pineapple or flour for a firmer texture.
3. Fold in chopped walnuts and raisins.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
